summary_ja: rawバックログ5件をトリアージ。うち2件はAI無関係（ビンテージコンピュータ、古代人類遺伝子学ポッドキャスト）、3件は既存エンティティページに既に収録済み（Notion Custom Agentsポッドキャスト、Marc Andreessen/OpenClawポッドキャスト、およびそのURL重複）。takeなし。

decisions.title: Refurb weekend double header: Alpha Micro AM-1000E and AM-1200
decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ 1980年代のAlpha Micro 68000ベースマルチユーザーシステムの修復作業記録。AI/LLM/エージェント技術と無関係。ビンテージコンピュータ趣味のブログ記事。
decisions.body_excerpt: I've mentioned previously my great affection for Alpha Microsystems hardware, which are rather obscure computers nowadays, but back in the 1980 and 1990s were fairly sophisticated 68000-based multiuser systems...

decisions.title: David Reich - Why the Bronze Age was an inflection point in human evolution
decisions.reason_ja: ★☆☆☆☆ ハーバード大学David Reich教授との古代DNA・人類進化に関するポッドキャストトランスクリプト。青铜器時代の自然選択加速がテーマ。AI/LLM技術と無関係。
decisions.body_excerpt: David Reich is back. He and collaborator Ali Akbari just published a paper that overturns a long-standing consensus about human evolution — that natural selection has been dormant in our species since the agricultural revolution.

decisions.title: Notion's Token Town: 5 Rebuilds, 100+ Tools, MCP vs CLIs and the Software Factory Future
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Notion Custom AgentsのLatent Spaceポッドキャスト。既にentities/notion.md（134行）、entities/sarah-sachs.md（79行）、entities/simon-last.md（95行）に詳細収録済み。agent harness進化、eval框架、software factoryビジョンなど全テーマがカバーされている。
decisions.body_excerpt: Sarah Sachs and Simon Last of Notion join us for a deep dive into how Notion built Custom Agents, why it took years and multiple rebuilds to get right, and what it means to turn a productivity tool into an agent-native system of record for enterprise work.

decisions.title: Marc Andreessen introspects on The Death of the Browser, Pi + OpenClaw, and Why "This Time Is Different"
decisions.reason_ja: ★★★☆☆ Marc AndreessenのLatent Spaceポッドキャスト。既にentities/marc-andreessen.md（107行）に「80-Year Overnight Success」「OpenClaw + Pi」「Death of the Browser」「Proof of Human」全セクション収録。entities/openclaw.md（316行）にも記載済み。
decisions.body_excerpt: Fresh off raising a monster $15B, Marc Andreessen has lived through multiple computing platform shifts firsthand, from Mosaic and Netscape to cofounding A16z.

decisions.title: Marc Andreessen introspects on The Death of the Browser, Pi + OpenClaw, and Why "This Time Is Different"
decisions.reason_ja: ★★☆☆☆ 上記#48be8440と同一エピソード。URLパラメータ違いのみ（play_card_show_title vs play_card_show_logo）。本文コンテンツ完全に重複。
decisions.body_excerpt: Fresh off raising a monster $15B, Marc Andreessen has lived through multiple computing platform shifts firsthand, from Mosaic and Netscape to cofounding A16z.
